MP Namara granted leave to introduce amendments to clip LoP Ssenyonyi’s powers
results.description: Parliament has granted Buyaga West MP Dennis Namara leave to introduce a Private Member’s Bill seeking to amend the Administration of Parliament Act, paving the way for fresh debate on how the Leader of the Opposition (LoP) is elected and held accountable. The decision followed a lengthy procedural debate during which deputy speaker Thomas Tayebwa [...] The post MP Namara granted leave to introduce amendments to clip LoP Ssenyonyi’s powers appeared first on The Observer Media Ltd .

results.title: Thai parliament approves amnesty for hundreds of activists
results.description: Thailand’s parliament passed an amnesty bill on Wednesday (Jul 8) benefitting hundreds of activists found guilty over the last 20 years, but not those sentenced for corruption or violating the royal insult law. The bill covers members of both the conservative, royalist “Yellow Shirts” and the “Red Shirts” who backed populist former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra, rival... The post Thai parliament approves amnesty for hundreds of activists appeared first on Read Selective .

results.title: Sanjay Raut criticises Devendra Fadnavis over governance and ‘Missing Link’ remarks
results.description: Sanjay Raut criticises Maharashtra CM Devendra Fadnavis over governance and remarks on the Missing Link project amid concerns of corruption and intimidation.
